settings.question_1: Will this actually help my hair look fuller?
settings.answer_1: While no shampoo can change hair overnight, rosemary is known for supporting scalp circulation and a healthier growth environment. Consistent use can help hair look fuller, stronger, and less prone to breakage.
settings.question_2: How long until I see results?
settings.answer_2: Most users notice a cleaner, healthier-feeling scalp right away. Fuller-looking, stronger hair typically appears within 4–8 weeks of regular use. Consistency is key.
settings.question_3: Is it safe for daily use?
settings.answer_3: Yes. The formula is lightweight, sulfate-free, and gentle enough for everyday washing—without stripping moisture or causing irritation.
settings.answer_4: Absolutely. Scalp health benefits everyone. The formula works for men and women dealing with thinning, breakage, or slow growth.

settings.review_text: This product went above and beyond what I expected. The build and performance are top-tier, and you can feel the quality right away. I’d absolutely recommend it to anyone considering it.

settings.title: Growth & Circulation
settings.description: Rosemary helps boost scalp circulation, creating a healthier foundation for fuller, stronger-looking hair.

settings.title: Hydrolyzed Keratin = Repair & Strength
settings.description: Damaged keratin makes hair weak and thin. This formula uses hydrolyzed keratin to bind to the hair shaft, helping reduce breakage, smooth split ends, and strengthen strands—so hair looks thicker and stronger.

settings.title: Targets Hair Loss From Two Angles
settings.description: Most shampoos only cleanse. This one cleans the scalp, nourishes the roots, and strengthens hair—leading to less fallout and more growth potential.

settings.title: Who is this perfect for?
settings.description:
Thinning hair

Breakage & split ends

Excess shedding

Dry, weak strands

Heat or color damage

settings.subtitle: Discover the outstanding features that makes our product stand out.

settings.title: 3% Rosemary
settings.text: Clinically recognized for improving scalp circulation and supporting hair regrowth. Helps reduce DHT activity while stimulating oxygen flow to weakened follicles.

settings.title: 3% Redensyl
settings.text: A patented hair growth molecule that targets hair follicle stem cells to reactivate dormant roots, strengthen anchoring, and increase hair density over time.

settings.title: 2% Anagain
settings.text: Derived from pea sprout extract, Anagain® extends the hair growth cycle (anagen phase) and reduces hair fall by re-energizing follicle metabolism.

settings.heading: Key Ingredients
settings.description: Powered by clinically proven scalp actives that reactivate dormant follicles, boost oxygen delivery, and strengthen roots for visibly thicker, healthier hair.

settings.title: Beard Benefits That Go Beyond Cleaning
settings.section_description: Our serum is specially formulated to support patchy beards, thin areas, and gaps helping your beard look healthier, thicker, and more even over time.

settings.review_text: I had patchy spots on my cheeks and jawline that never filled in properly. After a few weeks of using this consistently, my beard looks noticeably fuller and more even. It also feels much softer and healthier instead of dry and rough. Definitely sticking with this.

I was dealing with thinning around my hairline after having kids, and this shampoo made such a difference. My scalp feels cleaner, my hair looks fuller, and the rosemary scent is super refreshing. I’m honestly shocked at how fast I noticed a change.
I used to see hair all over my brush and shower drain. Two weeks in, the shedding has noticeably slowed down. My hair feels stronger and looks thicker at the roots. Highly recommend.
My hair was dry, dull, and breaking constantly. This shampoo brought back softness and shine. It actually feels nourished instead of stripped. I’m obsessed.
It’s rare to find a natural product that delivers results. The rosemary scent is clean and spa-like, and my hair feels stronger with every wash.
